_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: Following Nf2 inactivation, there was a 2-fold decrease in apoptosis as measured by cleaved caspase-3 immunocytochemistry and Western blotting
details: Successfully detected 2-fold decrease in apoptosis following Nf2 inactivation in SC NPCs by immunocytochemistry and Western blotting
